'''Ssyrmik''' was one of [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[New Republic Honor Guard|Honor Guard]] during her meeting with [[Seti Ashgad/Legends|Seti Ashgad]], where she died of the [[Death Seed]] Plague. She was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], a graduate of the [[New Republic Fleet Academy|New Republic Space Academy]], and sometimes made Leia feel as if she were old.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
